input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.13.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.13.1.1
            TITLE: when all parts of technical inspection are complete as shown on the technical inspection

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.13.1.1: When all parts of Technical Inspection are complete as shown on the Technical Inspection
IN.13.1.1 When all parts of Technical Inspection are complete as shown on the Technical Inspection 
sheet, the vehicle receives Inspection Approval

final_answer: rule IN.13.1.1: When all parts of Technical Inspection are complete as shown on the Technical Inspection sheet, the vehicle receives Inspection Approval
